title: PSG Champions League celebrations in France spark clashes; 416 detained, 7 police officers injured
summary_full: Over 400 people were arrested across France following Paris Saint-Germain's Champions League victory, as celebrations devolved into violence. Clashes erupted between police and supporters in Paris and near the stadium, resulting in injuries to seven officers and damage to vehicles and businesses. Authorities had deployed extensive security measures amid concerns of disturbances.
